topics.name: Number and Numeration
topics.description: JAMB UTME Section I: Number bases, fractions, percentages, indices, logarithms, surds, and set theory.

subtopics.name: Number Bases and Operations
objectives: Perform calculations in bases 2 to 10 and conversion between bases
Solve equations involving unknown number bases

subtopics.name: Fractions, Decimals, Percentages, and Financial Math
objectives: Perform operations on fractions, decimals, and calculate percentage errors
Calculate simple and compound interest, profit and loss, ratio, rates, shares, and Value Added Tax (VAT)

subtopics.name: Indices, Logarithms, and Surds
objectives: Apply laws of indices and standard form calculations
Apply laws of logarithms to solve logarithmic equations
Simplify surds and rationalise denominators of binomial surd expressions

subtopics.name: Sets and Venn Diagrams
objectives: Perform set operations: union, intersection, complement, difference
Use Venn diagrams to solve 2-set and 3-set practical problems

topics.name: Algebraic Processes
topics.description: JAMB UTME Section II: Polynomials, equations, inequalities, variation, AP/GP, and matrices.

subtopics.name: Polynomials and Algebraic Expressions
objectives: Expand, factorise, and simplify polynomial expressions
Apply Remainder Theorem and Factor Theorem to factorise cubic polynomials

subtopics.name: Linear, Quadratic, and Simultaneous Equations
objectives: Solve linear equations and change subject of formula
Solve quadratic equations using factorisation, completing square, and quadratic formula
Solve simultaneous linear-linear and linear-quadratic equations in two variables

subtopics.name: Inequalities and Functions
objectives: Solve linear inequalities and quadratic inequalities in one variable
Represent solutions of inequalities graphically
Determine domain, range, one-to-one, composite, and inverse functions

subtopics.name: Variation, Sequences, and Series
objectives: Formulate and solve direct, inverse, joint, and partial variation problems
Calculate nth term and sum of Arithmetic Progression (AP) and Geometric Progression (GP)
Calculate sum to infinity of a geometric series

subtopics.name: Matrices and Determinants
objectives: Perform matrix addition, subtraction, and multiplication up to 3x3 matrices
Calculate determinant of 2x2 and 3x3 matrices and inverse of 2x2 matrix
Solve system of 2 linear equations using matrix inversion / Cramer's rule

topics.name: Geometry and Trigonometry
topics.description: JAMB UTME Section III: Plane geometry, coordinate geometry of lines/circles, trigonometry, and solid geometry.

subtopics.name: Plane Geometry and Mensuration
objectives: Calculate perimeters, areas of plane shapes, and volumes of solid shapes (prisms, cones, spheres)
Apply angle theorems of triangles, polygons, and circle theorems

subtopics.name: Coordinate Geometry of Lines and Circles
objectives: Calculate distance between two points, midpoint, and gradient of a line
Determine equations of straight lines in gradient, intercept, and double-intercept forms
Determine conditions for parallel and perpendicular lines
Find equation of a circle given center (h,k) and radius r: (x-h)² + (y-k)² = r²

subtopics.name: Trigonometric Ratios and Equations
objectives: Calculate trigonometric ratios for standard angles (0°, 30°, 45°, 60°, 90°, 180°, 360°)
Apply sine rule and cosine rule to solve acute and obtuse triangles
Solve simple trigonometric equations within [0°, 360°]

subtopics.name: Bearings and 3D Solid Geometry
objectives: Calculate 3-figure compass bearings and solve navigation distance problems
Calculate angles between lines and planes in 3D solids

topics.name: Calculus
topics.description: JAMB UTME Section IV: Limits, differentiation, applications of derivatives, integration, and area under curves.

subtopics.name: Limits and Continuity
objectives: Evaluate limits of algebraic functions as x approaches a finite value or infinity
Identify continuous and discontinuous functions

subtopics.name: Differentiation and Applications
objectives: Differentiate polynomial, trigonometric, and explicit functions using power, product, quotient, and chain rules
Calculate rate of change, gradient of tangents and normals to curves
Locate maximum, minimum, and inflection turning points of algebraic curves

subtopics.name: Integration and Definite Integrals
objectives: Integrate polynomial and simple trigonometric functions
Evaluate definite integrals and calculate area bounded by a curve and axes

topics.name: Statistics and Probability
topics.description: JAMB UTME Section V: Data representation, measures of central tendency/dispersion, permutations, combinations, and probability.

subtopics.name: Data Presentation and Analysis
objectives: Interpret bar charts, pie charts, histograms, frequency tables, and ogives
Calculate mean, median, mode for grouped and ungrouped data
Calculate range, mean deviation, variance, and standard deviation

subtopics.name: Permutations and Combinations
objectives: Apply factorial notation n! and fundamental counting principle
Calculate permutations nPr and combinations nCr in selection problems

subtopics.name: Probability
objectives: Calculate probability of single, mutually exclusive, and independent events
Solve conditional probability and tree diagram problems
